## Which Component?

- [ ] Conformance suite (`conformance/`)

- [ ] TypeScript reference implementation (`reference/typescript/`)
- [ ] Documentation (`docs/`)

3. See error

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include the full traceback if applicable.

## Environment
